title: truellum glomeratum
intro: Truellum glomeratum, also known as Clustered Truellum, is a type of flowering plant in the balsam family native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Truellum glomeratum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Truellum glomeratum can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and it has also been used in the form of tinctures and infusions in traditional folk medicine.
